frontend-designer.description: Whenever working with ui or frontend requests or any user front requests

code-simplifier.description: Simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving all functionality. Focuses on recently modified code unless instructed otherwise.

golang-pro.description: Expert Go developer specializing in high-performance systems, concurrent programming, and cloud-native microservices. Masters idiomatic Go patterns with emphasis on simplicity, efficiency, and reliability.

python-pro.description: Expert Python developer specializing in modern Python 3.11+ development with deep expertise in type safety, async programming, data science, and web frameworks. Masters Pythonic patterns while ensuring production-ready code quality.

rust-pro.description: Expert Rust developer specializing in systems programming, memory safety, and zero-cost abstractions. Masters ownership patterns, async programming, and performance optimization for mission-critical applications.

sql-pro.description: Expert SQL developer specializing in complex query optimization, database design, and performance tuning across PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, and Oracle. Masters advanced SQL features, indexing strategies, and data warehousing patterns.

typescript-pro.description: Expert TypeScript developer specializing in large-scale application architecture, type safety, and modern frontend frameworks. Masters advanced TypeScript features, design patterns, and best practices for maintainable codebases.

github-actions-pro.description: Use this agent when working with GitHub Actions workflows, CI/CD pipelines, or DevOps automation.
